title: Why Multi-Step Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Collapses and How Supervisory Signals Fix It
innovation_summary: Why Multi-Step Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Collapses and How Supervisory Signals Fix It: To address this, we systematically investigate a diverse set of supervisory signals, including off-policy supervision, hint-based guidance, erroneous example supervision, and others, applied under both synchronous.
